steps.title: Mark the move to another moon
steps.content: The passage moves from Elara to Harpalyke. It also shifts from a prograde orbit to the opposite kind of orbit, so the transition should signal a different location.

steps.title: Reject same-idea transitions
steps.content: Choices A, B, and C would specify, restate, or give an example of the same idea. The remaining transition fits a move to a different Jovian moon. The answer is D.
